title: LagFree Survival
description: Have u ever feeled lag in survival world but server's work complety fine ?, This Modpack solves  your problem instantly Dont Belive me Try It out.
body:
# 🌿LagFree Survival–Smooth. Fast. Unstoppable.
LagFree Survival is a highly optimized survival experience designed for maximum FPS and zero stutters, even on low-end PCs. Every tweak, setting, and optimization is focused on one goal — PURE PERFORMANCE without ruining vanilla survival.

⚡ Experience up to 300% – 500% MORE FPS
🧠 Smart memory usage & performance-focused configs
🎮 Ultra-smooth gameplay — best performance in Singleplayer

## 🔧 Performance Optimized

Runs smoothly on 4GB RAM systems

Recommended RAM allocation: 3076 MB

Reduced lag spikes & faster chunk loading

Singleplayer-focused optimizations for maximum FPS

### 🧪 2GB RAM Systems (Experimental)

You can try this pack on 2GB RAM PCs

Not officially tested on 2GB systems

Expected / assumed FPS: ~30–45 FPS

Performance may vary depending on CPU & background apps

## 🟢 Why LagFree Survival?

✔ No unnecessary features
✔ No visual clutter
✔ No gameplay-breaking changes
✔ Just smooth survival

### 🖥️ Minimum Recommended Specs

RAM: 4GB (Allocate 3076 MB)

CPU: Dual-core or higher

GPU: Integrated or Dedicated

✨ Play survival the way it was meant to be — Lag-Free.
